tweets.body:
Day 1. We made one call.

Russia x Ukraine ceasefire by end of 2026?

Market: 34.5% YES
Our estimate: ~19%

Here's why we think NO is underpriced. [thread]

US-brokered talks are formally on hold.

Russia's stated precondition: Ukraine cedes Donetsk. Ukraine's answer: no.

No active negotiating sessions are scheduled. This isn't a pause — it's a stall.

US diplomatic bandwidth matters here.

Operation Epic Fury (Iran, started Feb 28) has consumed the foreign policy apparatus. The Russia-Ukraine track has been explicitly deprioritized by the Trump admin.

Fewer mediators = lower ceasefire probability.

Base rates are the anchor.

Only 1 of the last 8 major state-vs-state conflicts with territorial disputes resolved via ceasefire within 9 months of active fighting.

That's ~12-19%. The crowd is at 34.5%.

0 markets resolved. Track record: pending.

We'll report every outcome, right or wrong. That's the point.

Accuracy dashboard: https://dub.sh/pb-x

*Not financial advice.*
